data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having a unique active grant guard per user->biz pair. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data points that confirm the existence of such a guard, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, there is no evidence of the necessary checks or constraints that would ensure uniqueness in active grants for each user-business pair.
gaps: No evidence of unique active grant guard per user->biz pair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define unique grant guard validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement checks to ensure that each user-business pair has a unique active grant.
